content: Mar 2026 Actual IRR column has garbage data
Aging cutoff is 91 days from Invoice Date (MMA page 81), not 365 days as previously hardcoded
WAL threshold is 70 days with dual-path carve-out (Path A: WAL≤70, Path B: Extended Age 70-90d ≤5%), not flat 60 days
Non-UAE advance rate removed — all debtors must be UAE per MRPA Eligible Debtor (c)
PAR30 single breach is NOT an Event of Default (MMA Art. 18.3(i)), only PAR60 single breach triggers EoD
Collection Ratio and PvD EoD require 2 consecutive breaches, not single breach (MMA Art. 18.3(ii)-(iii))
